use_cases: Hero section animated background for landing pages
Decorative starfield backdrop for creative portfolios
Ambient loading animation for web applications
Visual separator or section divider for websites
Atmospheric background for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A canvas-based 3D starfield spiral animation featuring 5000 stars with motion trails creating a depth-based spiral effect. Uses GSAP for smooth 15-second looping timeline animation with camera travel through space. Self-contained with Vector2D, Vector3D, and Star classes for coordinate management. Produces a dark, cosmic aesthetic suitable as an animated hero background or decorative visual element.
